query.title: Search query
query.description: Google Maps search query, e.g. 'coffee shops'.

location.title: Location
location.description: Location constraint for the search, e.g. 'San Francisco, CA'.

limit.title: Max places
limit.description: Maximum number of places to crawl.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent requests used by the underlying scraper.
